courseTitle: Level Design, Spaces, and Encounter Craft
title: Nonlinear Mission Game
genericDescription: Design objectives that can be completed in multiple orders; manage dependency and player planning; support meaningful route choice.
specificDescription: Build a mission with at least three objectives available in nonlinear order. At least one objective must change the state or difficulty of another.
gradingRubric: 30 pts nonlinear structure; 20 pts dependency design; 20 pts route choice; 15 pts state communication; 15 pts documentation.
